question: Will Bitcoin hit $150k by June 30, 2026?
description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title by 11:59PM ET on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

question: Will Manchester City FC win on 2026-05-19?
description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for May 19, 2026
If Manchester City FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: AFC Bournemouth vs. Manchester City FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Premier League game, scheduled for Tuesday, May 19, 2026 between AFC Bournemouth and Manchester City FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Manchester City's pursuit of the Premier League title, after securing the FA Cup just days earlier, underpins their 60.5% implied probability against Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium. Pep Guardiola’s side trail Arsenal by two points with two matches remaining and boast a dominant historical record, winning 18 of the past 19 league encounters. Bournemouth’s 16-game unbeaten Premier League run and push for European qualification create realistic upset potential reflected in their 19.5% odds, while the 21.5% draw price accounts for the Cherries’ strong home form and defensive organization. Recent squad availability updates, including Lewis Cook’s return from injury for Bournemouth and City’s near-full fitness, further shape this closely contested matchup.

question: Will Trump say "Iran" during events with Xi Jinping?
description:
Donald Trump is scheduled to meet with Xi Jinping from May 14 to May 15, 2026 (https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/04/china/china-us-talks-iran-intl-hnk). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump says the listed term during his appearance at events featuring Xi Jinping from May 14 through May 15, 2026 (Beijing Time). Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

This market is explicitly about events featuring both Donald Trump and Xi Jinping from May 14 through May 15, 2026 (Beijing Time). All such events featuring both on these dates count. Speeches, events, or comments which feature one named individual but not the other, will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the events contain a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

If this visit is definitively cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Donald Trump’s mid-May 2026 state visit to Beijing for bilateral meetings with Xi Jinping centered on trade, technology controls, critical minerals supply chains, and regional security. Discussions addressed ongoing U.S.-China economic competition, potential purchases of U.S. agricultural goods and aircraft, and Beijing’s stance on Taiwan as a core interest. The summit also touched on the Iran conflict’s impact on global energy markets and calls for stable bilateral relations amid tariff and export-control tensions. These topics, combined with Trump’s public remarks praising cooperation while reiterating U.S. priorities, shape trader focus on which specific issues or phrasing will feature most prominently in official readouts and press events.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Eastern Conference Finals matchup between the third-seeded New York Knicks and fourth-seeded Cleveland Cavaliers opens with Game 1 at Madison Square Garden, where the Knicks hold home-court advantage in the best-of-seven series. Both clubs enter after strong regular-season finishes, with the Knicks at 53-29 and the Cavaliers at 52-30, setting up a clash defined by contrasting styles. Key factors include the Knicks’ defensive versatility led by Jalen Brunson and Karl-Anthony Towns, the Cavaliers’ perimeter scoring from Donovan Mitchell, and recent head-to-head results that saw Cleveland pull away in a February regular-season win. Rest, travel, and early-series momentum will shape early probabilities, while the winner advances toward the NBA Finals.

question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Iran and the United states agree to a permanent peace deal by the specified date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”. 

A permanent peace deal refers to any agreement which explicitly indicates that military hostilities between the United States and Iran have ended or will permanently cease, or uses equivalent language clearly signaling a lasting end to military hostilities between the United States and Iran. Agreements that are explicitly temporary or which do not include a definitive agreement to end military hostilities between the US and Iran on a lasting basis (e.g. a temporary extension of the two-week ceasefire agreement announced on April 7, 2026), will not qualify.

A qualifying agreement will be considered to have been established if either of the following conditions are met:

- The United States and Iran each sign or formally adopt a written agreement (e.g. a treaty or multi-point agreement) which meets the above criteria.

- Both the governments of the United States and Iran provide clear public confirmation that a qualifying agreement has been definitively established. Negotiations, statements of progress, or other statements which do not constitute a definitive announcement that a qualifying agreement has been reached will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The fragile April 2026 Pakistan-mediated ceasefire between the United States and Iran remains in place but under severe strain, with President Trump describing it as on “life support” after rejecting Tehran’s latest counterproposal in mid-May. Core sticking points in ongoing diplomatic exchanges center on verifiable limits to Iran’s nuclear enrichment program, full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for commercial shipping, relief from U.S. sanctions, and curbs on ballistic missiles. Direct high-level talks have not resumed since the April 11–12 meetings in Islamabad, while intermittent naval incidents and mutual blockades continue to disrupt energy flows and heighten escalation risks. Both sides have signaled willingness to keep channels open through Pakistani mediators, yet persistent gaps and the absence of a comprehensive framework leave near-term resolution of a permanent peace agreement uncertain ahead of any scheduled deadlines.

question: LoL: BNK FEARX vs Nongshim Red Force (BO3) - Esports World Cup Korea Qualifier Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the LoL Lower bracket quarterfinal 1 match between BNK FEARX and Nongshim Red Force in the Esports World Cup Korea Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 19 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "BNK FEARX" if BNK FEARX win the match against Nongshim Red Force.

This market will resolve to "Nongshim Red Force" if Nongshim Red Force win the match against BNK FEARX.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Nongshim Red Force heads into this Best of 3 with clear momentum from recent LCK results, including a 2-0 series win over DN Freecs and consistent performances from starters like Kingen, Scout, and Diable. BNK FEARX has shown vulnerability against elite competition, dropping series to Gen.G and others in the past week while relying heavily on individual carry performances from Raptor. Historical head-to-head records favor BNK in some prior meetings, yet Nongshim’s stronger patch adaptation and mid-lane control in the current meta create a matchup edge that traders appear to reflect in the implied probabilities. The lower-bracket playoff setting adds elimination pressure, making any early-game macro errors or ban-phase misreads especially costly for the underdog side.

question: Dota 2: Team Falcons vs Tundra Esports - Game 2 Winner
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 Upper Bracket Quarterfinal 1 match between Team Falcons and Tundra Esports in the DreamLeague Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 19 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Falcons" if Team Falcons win Game 2 against Tundra Esports.

This market will resolve to "Tundra Esports" if Tundra Esports win Game 2 against Team Falcons.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 2 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 2. 

If Game 2 is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. 

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: Team Falcons enter this DreamLeague Season 29 playoffs best-of-three with strong recent momentum after topping Group A undefeated and defeating Team Spirit 2-1 in their latest series. Ranked first globally, the Saudi-backed squad maintains roster stability and excels in map control and late-game execution against mid-tier opponents. Tundra Esports, currently ninth in world rankings, brings aggressive early-game strategies and solid European form but has struggled in direct matchups with top teams. Historical head-to-head results lean toward Falcons, though Tundra's ability to force decisive drafts remains a key variable in this single-elimination playoff context.

eventMetadata.context_description: The San Antonio Spurs' stunning 122-115 double-overtime victory in Game 1 of the 2026 Western Conference Finals has shifted momentum heading into Wednesday's rematch at Oklahoma City, where Victor Wembanyama posted 41 points and 24 rebounds to expose Thunder rebounding and defensive vulnerabilities. Oklahoma City returns to near-full strength with Jalen Williams back from his hamstring strain and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander leading a rested rotation, though the absence of Thomas Sorber leaves frontcourt depth thin. The Spurs list De'Aaron Fox as questionable with ankle soreness entering the contest, raising questions about backcourt stability against a Thunder side that swept the Lakers in the prior round. Home-court advantage and historical playoff experience favor the Thunder in this best-of-seven series, yet San Antonio's recent form and size advantage on the glass create realistic paths for continued competitiveness.

question: Will the Iranian regime fall by May 31?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Islamic Republic of Iran’s current ruling regime is overthrown, collapsed, or otherwise ceases to govern by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This requires a broad consensus of reporting indicating that core structures of the Islamic Republic (e.g. the office of the Supreme Leader, the Guardian Council, IRGC control under clerical authority) have been dissolved, incapacitated, or replaced by a fundamentally different governing system or otherwise lost de facto power over a majority of the population of Iran. This could occur via revolution, civil war, military coup, or voluntary abdication, but only qualifies if the Islamic Republic no longer exercises sovereign power.

Routine political events such as elections, reforms, or leadership succession do not qualify. Internal coups or power shifts that preserve the Islamic Republic’s core structures also do not qualify. Only a clear break in continuity—such as a new provisional government, revolutionary council, or constitution replacing the Islamic Republic will qualify.

Partial loss of territory or challenges from rebel or exile groups will not qualify unless the Islamic Republic no longer administers the majority of the Iranian population within Iran. 

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Iranian regime's institutional resilience, backed by security forces and recent assertions of control amid a fragile ceasefire, underpins traders' near-certain assessment that core structures will remain intact through late May. Following Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's February assassination and subsequent U.S.-Israeli operations, authorities quelled earlier unrest through arrests and rallies, with no widespread defections or renewed protests reported in the past several weeks as the Revolutionary Guard maintains order and proposes terms to shape post-hostilities arrangements. External support from partners like Russia has further aided military stabilization, reflecting high barriers to rapid collapse even after economic strains and leadership transitions. Late developments such as unexpected mass demonstrations or renewed escalations remain possible but lack supporting indicators in the current environment.

question: Will Morocco win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The closely bunched implied probabilities among France, Spain, England, and the next tier of contenders underscore a wide-open 2026 FIFA World Cup field driven by elite squad depth and recent international form. France benefits from a proven core including experienced forwards and defensive stability, while Spain’s possession-based style and depth from domestic success keep it competitive. England’s attacking options and improved tournament mentality add pressure, and South American sides like Brazil and Argentina maintain historical edge through technical quality and star power. Qualifying campaigns, Nations League results, and ongoing roster adjustments continue to shape trader sentiment without any single nation pulling decisively clear.
